title: mallotus glomerulatus
intro: Mallotus glomerulatus, also known as the Thai candle plant or candle bush, is a type of flowering plant in the spurge family native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mallotus glomerulatus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include extracts, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
